steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to refute the claim that malapportionment in the Storting favors small urban districts. To refute, the response must explain that the formula actually favors rural districts.

steps.title: Match the goal to a choice
steps.content:
Choice C cites the formula (more points per land than per resident) and shows it overrepresents less populated rural districts with large tracts of land — directly refuting the urban-favoring claim.

  • A is internally inconsistent ("overrepresents more populated")
  • B says urban districts are favored (the opposite of refuting)
  • D is just a definition
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
